Hi Fan Yong,

After doing some experiments, I found the strange test failures on this patch and its parent patch https://review.whamcloud.com/25336 were caused by rebasing after the landing of LU-7473 patch https://review.whamcloud.com/19790.

Before rebasing, the test failures didn't occur in https://review.whamcloud.com/25336. Although the lastest patch set 14 passed testing, the test failures still exist in https://review.whamcloud.com/27151, which is dependent on https://review.whamcloud.com/25336. 

Could you please take a look at this issue? Thank you.

commit.subject: LU-10465 lov: increase default stripe size to 4MB
commit.message:
LU-10465 lov: increase default stripe size to 4MB

Increase the default stripe size from 1MB to 4MB
so that widely-striped files can generate full RPCs
without pinning so much memory on the client.

The patch also renames STRIPE_BYTES and STRIPES_PER_OBJ
to DEF_STRIPE_SIZE and DEF_STRIPE_COUNT in cfg/local.sh,
and unsets them to support formatting Lustre filesystem
with default stripe size and count.
